sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince method: treat each add-on as independent system, calculate HPR for each tranche separately, size based on current equity level. Author does not specify optimal_f value, kelly fraction, or drawdown tolerance—these must be derived from historical add-on performance data.

source_rule_text: Treat each add-on to a position as a separate market system and use HPR calculations to determine the optimal amount to add on based on current equity level.
